_comment: UI image layer definitions for Aurora Dusk: Steam Age. Edit 'file' to swap any image — the game reads this at startup. Set 'file' to null to skip a layer.

_stretch_options.keep_aspect_covered: Fill the screen, crop edges if needed. Aspect ratio preserved. (Recommended for backgrounds.)
_stretch_options.keep_aspect_centered: Fit inside the screen, letterbox/pillarbox if needed. Aspect ratio preserved.
_stretch_options.stretch: Stretch to fill exactly, ignoring aspect ratio.

_blend_options.add: Additive — black pixels (0,0,0) become invisible. Use for images with a pure-black background instead of real transparency.

loading._comment: Shown at startup while the game boots. Fades in → holds → fades out.

main_menu._comment: Main menu background layers, drawn bottom to top.

layers._note: home.png has a pure-black background (no real alpha). ADD blending makes black transparent.
Darkening overlay. Set opacity to 0 to disable.
